summary: Implemented Tasks 4.2, 4.3, and 4.4 together in a single pass against the current file state (which already had 1.2 and 1.3 terminology changes applied). Task 4.2: updated deleteUpload in client.ts to accept optional cascade boolean query param; added delete state (deleteTarget, isDeleting) to DocumentImportSection; added handleDeleteRequest, handleDeleteConfirm, handleDeleteCancel handlers; added inline DeleteConfirmDialog component that shows two-option cascade dialog for completed documents and simple OK/Cancel for unprocessed documents; wired onDelete prop to both GridCard and ListCard. Task 4.3: added isRenaming/renameTo/renaming state and renameInputRef to both GridCard and ListCard; pencil icon appears on hover next to document name in both views; clicking pencil switches name display to input field with save (checkmark) and cancel (X) buttons; Enter saves, Escape cancels; max 255 chars; save calls documentsApi.renameUpload then onRenameComplete (which calls loadUploads). Task 4.4: in GridCard meta section, increased document name from text-xs to text-xs md:text-sm, status and date labels from text-[11px] to text-[11px] md:text-xs, and action button from text-xs to text-xs md:text-sm using responsive Tailwind prefixes. TypeScript compilation: clean (no errors).
notes_for_reviewer: The delete button in GridCard uses inline CSS opacity toggling on mouseEnter/Leave since the parent div has overflow-hidden which clips Tailwind group-hover. The ListCard trash button is always visible (no hover-only) for better discoverability in list layout.

handleDeleteConfirm deletes all pages of a group document (iterates item.pages). For a cascade delete on a multi-page group, this sends one DELETE request per page. The backend should handle each individually since each has its own upload ID.

The rename for group documents calls renameUpload on the primaryUpload ID only. The backend renameUpload endpoint should handle this as a group rename (renaming the group_name). If the backend only renames a single file and not the group, a backend-side change may be needed separately.
useRef import was added (useRef) to support focus management on the rename input field.
